title: gateway: mesh_to_upstream allocates vec![0u8; 1500] per call
description: In gateway.rs:40-41 and 74, vec allocations happen on every call to mesh_to_upstream. In a hot path, consider a reusable buffer passed by caller to avoid repeated heap allocations.
close_reason: Gateway runs on Linux (border router), not embedded. 1500-byte allocations per packet are acceptable for a std-environment gateway.
